# Caye

> Caye is a WhatsApp-first AI staff member for tour operators. She answers
> guest messages, quotes tours, and books them — live on WhatsApp,
> Instagram, and Messenger. Guests never install an app; they just message
> the operator's existing number and Caye handles the conversation.

## What Caye does

- Answers guest questions about tours, pricing, and availability in real time.
- Quotes and books tours directly inside the chat.
- Works across WhatsApp, Instagram DMs, and Messenger — the operator's own
  business accounts, not a separate Caye-branded number.
- Reads and writes to the operator's Zoho Mail, Gmail, and Google Calendar
  in the back office.
- Back-office control (the operator managing Caye's settings, seeing
  bookings, etc.) also happens by messaging Caye directly on WhatsApp,
  not through a settings dashboard.

## Who it's for

Small tour operators and activity businesses — the kind of team where the
owner or a couple of staff currently answer guest DMs by hand.

## Company

Caye is built by TropiTech Solutions, based in Nassau, Bahamas.
